title: The Marines Choose Rescue
description: On pages 7–10, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The central beat is the marines choose rescue.
scene: The scene focuses on the marines choose rescue, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 shaping the Punk Hazard conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You're more powerful than I am!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I have a proposition, Trafalgar Law .....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I trust you have no objections, more'?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Watch your mouth, you little brat!!!

dialogue.speaker: Punk Hazard Guards
dialogue.text: Master, I have prepared the transmission.

summary: The Marines Choose Rescue. This part advances Punk Hazard’s rescue mission, Caesar’s experiment, and the fragile pirate–Marine alliance.
